look.default: You look. It looks back. Neither of you learns anything.

take.default: It declines to be taken. Respect that.

use.default: You use it as hard as you can. Nothing happens, professionally.

talk.default: You clear your throat. The silence files a ticket.

open.default: It stays closed with the quiet confidence of enterprise hardware.

unknownVerb: The parser stares at '{input}' and quietly increments an error counter somewhere.
didYouMean: Did you mean '{suggestion}'? Of course you did. Running that instead.
